title: ferray-numpy-interop: IntoNumPy creates flat PyArray1 then reshapes — extra allocation
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

IntoNumPy for Ix2 and IxDyn in numpy_conv.rs first creates a flat PyArray1 via PyArray1::from_vec(data), then reshapes: 'arr.reshape(shape)'. This creates a temporary 1D NumPy array that is immediately reshaped. PyO3's numpy crate provides PyArray2::from_vec2 and from_owned_array that can create the correctly-shaped array directly. The reshape is also fallible (returns Result) introducing an unnecessary error path. Use the shape-aware constructors directly.
